What We Fix

Our Services

Whether your computer is slow, broken, infected, or won't turn on — MaxTech has the tools and expertise to fix it right the first time.

01
Virus & Malware Removal

Full system scans and deep cleaning of viruses, spyware, ransomware, and malware. We also install proactive protection so it doesn't happen again.

Book Now →
02
Data Recovery

Lost your files due to a crashed hard drive, accidental deletion, or formatting? Our recovery specialists retrieve data others can't — with a high success rate.

Book Now →
03
Screen Replacement

Cracked or dead laptop screen? We replace screens for all major brands — Dell, HP, Lenovo, Apple, Asus, and more. Usually done the same day.

Book Now →
04
Performance Upgrades

Slow computer? We upgrade RAM, replace old HDDs with fast SSDs, and clean up bloatware — giving your machine a new lease on life at a fraction of the cost of a new PC.

Book Now →
05
OS & Software Repair

Blue screen of death, Windows crashes, or software conflicts — we fix operating system issues, reinstall Windows or macOS clean, and restore all your settings.

Book Now →
06
Network & Wi-Fi Setup

Slow internet, dropped connections, or setting up a new home or office network — we handle router config, Wi-Fi extenders, and full network troubleshooting.

Book Now →

Repair Guarantee
How It Works

4 Simple Steps

Getting your computer fixed is easy. Drop it off, or we come to you — the choice is yours.

01
Book an Appointment

Use our online form, call us, or just walk in. Tell us what's wrong and we'll schedule a time that works — same-day slots often available.

02
Free Diagnosis

Our certified technicians run a full diagnostic at no charge. We'll tell you exactly what's wrong and give you a firm upfront quote before touching anything.

03
We Fix It Fast

Once you approve the quote, we get to work. Most repairs are completed within 24 hours. We'll text or call you the moment your device is ready.

04
90-Day Guarantee

Every repair comes with our 90-day warranty. If the same issue returns within 90 days, we fix it free — no questions asked. That's the MaxTech promise.
